title: JavaScript Fundamentals
description: Learn the core concepts of JavaScript: variables, data types, operators, control flow, and functions.

sections.name: Basics
sections.description: Getting started with variables and data types

sections.name: Control Flow
sections.description: Make decisions and repeat code with if/else and loops

blocks.content:
This course teaches you the core concepts of JavaScript, from variables to functions. Each lesson includes explanations, code examples, and practice exercises.

No prior programming experience needed—just a willingness to learn!

- **Variables & Data Types**: Store and work with different kinds of information
- **Operators**: Perform calculations and comparisons
- **Control Flow**: Make decisions with if/else and repeat code with loops
- **Functions**: Write reusable blocks of code
Use the navigation menu on the left to jump to any lesson. We recommend starting with **Variables** to build a solid foundation.
